description: Reference documentation for PFC syntax elements and model properties. These are not standalone commands but language elements used within commands.

contact-models.name: Contact Models
contact-models.description: Contact model properties (mechanical & thermal) — kn, ks, fric, bond/joint params, etc.
contact-models.summary: 22 contact models across PFC 6.0/7.0/9.0 (version-filtered): linear, flatjoint, smoothjoint, softbond, hertz, mohr, springnetwork, and more

range-elements.name: Range Elements
range-elements.description: Range filtering syntax (position, cylinder, group, id, etc.)
range-elements.summary: Geometric, attribute, and logical range filters

plot-items.name: Plot Item Keywords
plot-items.description: Configuration keywords for plot item types (ball, wall, contact coloring, cut planes, legend)
plot-items.summary: Keywords for 'plot item create <type>' — color-by, cut, transparency, legend, etc.

notes: References are syntax elements used within commands, not standalone commands
